sections.title: 一、词汇分类
sections.instruction: 选出与句中画线单词同类的一项。

questions.prompt: I can <u>jump</u> high.
questions.explanation: 句中 jump 是动词，意为“跳”。选项 A. give 是动词（给）；B. sport 是名词（运动）；C. across 是副词/介词（穿过）。因此 jump 与 give 同属动词类，故选 A。

questions.prompt: I like playing <u>volleyball</u>.
questions.explanation: 句中 volleyball 是球类运动名词。选项 A. piano 意为钢琴（乐器）；B. ping-pong 意为乒乓球（球类运动名词）；C. fruit 意为水果。因此 volleyball 与 ping-pong 同类，故选 B。

questions.prompt: He is a <u>kind</u> old man.
questions.explanation: 句中 kind 是形容词，意为“善良的”。选项 A. fail 是动词；B. first 是序数词/形容词；C. hard 可以作形容词，意为“努力的、困难的”，与 kind 同属形容词，故选 C。

questions.prompt: They play sports every <u>month</u>.
questions.explanation: 句中 month 是时间名词，意为“月份”。选项 A. ability 意为能力；B. year 意为年份（时间名词）；C. money 意为金钱。因此 month 与 year 同类，故选 B。

questions.prompt: He is a famous <u>player</u>.
questions.translation: 他是一位著名的运动员。
questions.explanation: 句中 player 是指人的名词，意为“运动员”。选项 A. teacher 意为教师（指人的名词）；B. never 意为从不；C. hope 意为希望。因此 player 与 teacher 同类，故选 A。

sections.title: 二、单项选择
sections.instruction: 选择可以填入句子空白处的最佳答案。

questions.prompt: The birds can fly, but they ______ swim.
questions.translation: 鸟会飞，但是它们不会游泳。
questions.explanation: 根据 but 表示转折，前半句是 can fly（会飞），后半句应该是否定“不会游泳”，故选 C. can't。

questions.prompt: I like ______; He can ______.
questions.explanation: like 后面接动词-ing形式（running）作宾语；情态动词 can 后面接动词原形（run），故选 A。

questions.prompt: We can't play football, but we can ______.
questions.translation: 我们不会踢足球，但是我们可以学。
questions.explanation: 根据 can't play football（不会踢足球）和 but（但是），表示我们可以去“学习”，learn 意为学习，符合句意，故选 C。

questions.prompt: He can't walk ______ he loses his legs.
questions.translation: 他不能走路，因为他失去了双腿。
questions.explanation: 前半句“他不能走路”是结果，后半句“他失去了双腿”是原因，表示因果关系且前果后因，用 because，故选 B。

questions.prompt: ______ Jim jump far at first? Yes, he can.
questions.translation: 吉姆一开始能跳得远吗？是的，他能。
questions.explanation: 答语中含有 can (Yes, he can)，因此问句应用情态动词 Can 开头，排除 B；既然答语是肯定回答 Yes，故选 A。

sections.title: 三、首字母填空
sections.instruction: 根据图片和首字母提示填入适当单词补全句子。

questions.prompt:
The boy can j______ high.
[*VISUAL: 一个男孩跳得高*]
questions.explanation: 根据图片“一个男孩跳得高”和首字母 j 的提示，应该填动词 jump（跳）。

questions.prompt:
The little girl can't get m______ for food.
[*VISUAL: 一个没有钱买食物的小女孩*]
questions.translation: 这个小女孩没有钱买食物。
questions.explanation: 根据图片“没有钱买食物的小女孩”和首字母 m 的提示，应该填名词 money（钱）。

questions.prompt:
The boy is very k______.
[*VISUAL: 一个热心帮助别人的男孩*]
questions.explanation: 根据图片“热心帮助别人的男孩”和首字母 k 的提示，应该填形容词 kind（善良的/热心的）。

questions.prompt:
I'm i______; I can't go to school.
[*VISUAL: 一个生病躺在床上的孩子*]
questions.translation: 我生病了；我不能去上学。
questions.explanation: 根据图片“生病躺在床上的孩子”和首字母 i 的提示，应该填形容词 ill（生病的）。

questions.prompt:
I can't play p______, but I try my best to learn.
[*VISUAL: 有人尝试打乒乓球*]
questions.translation: 我不会打乒乓球，但我会尽力去学。
questions.explanation: 结合本单元球类运动的主题以及图片“尝试打乒乓球或弹钢琴”，且 play 后面接球类名词时不用冠词，故填 ping-pong。

sections.title: 四、补全对话
sections.instruction: 选择合适的选项补全对话。
sections.passage:
**Lili:** Do you like playing sports?
**Xiaohua:** 1. [1] I like playing basketball. 2. [2]
**Lili:** Yes, I can. But I can't play well.
**Xiaohua:** 3. [3]
**Lili:** Thank you. 4. [4]
**Lingling:** I can swim and play volleyball.
**Lili:** Great! Can we play together?
**Lingling:** 5. [5]
wordbank: Don't worry. I can teach you.

questions.explanation: 对于 Lili 提问的一般疑问句 “Do you like playing sports?”，结合后面 “I like playing basketball” 的肯定叙述，可知应选肯定回答 Yes, I do。
根据 Lili 下一轮回答 “Yes, I can. But I can't play well.” 可知，上一句是在询问 Lili 能否进行某项运动，因此选 Can you play basketball?

questions.answer: Don't worry. I can teach you.
questions.explanation: Lili 说自己打得不好，Xiaohua 进行安慰并表示可以教她，符合常理，故选 Don't worry. I can teach you。
根据 Lingling 回答的 “I can swim and play volleyball.” 可知此处是询问 Lingling 能做什么，故选 What can you do, Lingling?
对于 Lili 提问的 “Can we play together?”（我们能一起玩/运动吗？），此处应作肯定回答，故选 Yes, we can。

sections.title: 五、选词填空
sections.instruction: 根据材料内容，选择合适的运动填空。
sections.passage:
I am Lily. I am from Guangdong. I am good at running. I work hard. I keep running every day. I never give up. I win a lot of games.

I am Qiqi. I am from Liaoning. I like sports. I am good at playing ping-pong. I am very brave(勇敢的) in the games.

I am Xixi. I am from Shanghai. I am very tall. I am also strong. I can jump really high. I am a basketball player.

I am Keke. I am from Jiangsu. I like swimming. And my hobby is dancing. I can swim fast. I think I am a great player.

questions.explanation: 根据文本“I am Lily. ... I am good at running.”以及图示可知 Lily 擅长的运动是跑步。
根据文本“I am Xixi. ... I am a basketball player.”可知 Xixi 擅长的运动是篮球。
根据文本“I am Qiqi. ... I am good at playing ping-pong.”可知 Qiqi 擅长的运动是乒乓球。
根据文本“I am Keke. ... I like swimming.”可知 Keke 擅长的运动是游泳。

sections.title: 六、阅读判断
sections.instruction: 根据材料内容，判断句子正(T)误(F)。
sections.passage:
I am Lily. I am from Guangdong. I am good at running. I work hard. I keep running every day. I never give up. I win a lot of games.

I am Qiqi. I am from Liaoning. I like sports. I am good at playing ping-pong. I am very brave(勇敢的) in the games.

I am Xixi. I am from Shanghai. I am very tall. I am also strong. I can jump really high. I am a basketball player.

I am Keke. I am from Jiangsu. I like swimming. And my hobby is dancing. I can swim fast. I think I am a great player.

questions.prompt: Lily never stops running.
questions.explanation: 根据文章中 “I keep running every day. I never give up.”（我每天坚持跑步。我从不放弃。）可知表述正确。

questions.prompt: Qiqi is a tall and strong basketball player.
questions.translation: Qiqi 是一个又高又壮的篮球运动员。
questions.explanation: 根据文章中 “I am Xixi. ... I am very tall. I am also strong. ... I am a basketball player.” 可知，又高又壮的篮球运动员是 Xixi，而不是 Qiqi。Qiqi 擅长打乒乓球，故表述错误。

questions.prompt: Keke is an English sports star.
questions.translation: Keke 是一位英国运动明星。
questions.explanation: 根据文章中 “I am Keke. I am from Jiangsu.”（我是可可。我来自江苏。）可知可可来自中国江苏，不是英国，故表述错误。

questions.prompt: The kids are good at different sports.
questions.translation: 孩子们擅长不同的运动。
questions.explanation: 根据文章，Lily 擅长跑步（running），Qiqi 擅长乒乓球（ping-pong），Xixi 擅长篮球（basketball），Keke 擅长游泳（swimming），他们擅长不同的运动，故表述正确。
